ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "subregion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subregion */,
  "population_2022" INTEGER /* Population of the country in 2022 */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Official currency of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_subregion_id FOREIGN KEY ("subregion_id") REFERENCES subregions ("subregion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent to which the region belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subregions" (
  "subregion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subregion */,
  "subregion_name" TEXT /* Name of the subregion */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subregion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subregions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  "age_range_start" INTEGER /* Starting age of the age group */,
  "age_range_end" INTEGER /* Ending age of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year for which data is available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gender */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population count for the specified demographic group */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_growth_rates" (
  "growth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth rate data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Population growth rate for the specified year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("growth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_growth_rates_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_growth_rates_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_distribution" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age distribution data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population in the specified age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_age_distribution_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_age_distribution_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_age_distribution_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gender_ratios" (
  "ratio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender ratio data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "male_population" INTEGER /* Number of males */,
  "female_population" INTEGER /* Number of females */,
  "ratio" REAL /* Ratio of males to females */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ratio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gender_ratios_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gender_ratios_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_projections" (
  "projection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each projection data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "projected_population" INTEGER /* Projected population for the specified year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("projection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_projections_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_projections_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "life_expectancy" (
  "expectancy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each life expectancy data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "male_life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy for males */,
  "female_life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy for females */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expectancy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_life_expectancy_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_life_expectancy_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fertility_rates" (
  "fertility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fertility rate data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "fertility_rate" REAL /* Fertility rate for the specified year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fertility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fertility_rates_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fertility_rates_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mortality_rates" (
  "mortality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mortality rate data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "mortality_rate" REAL /* Mortality rate for the specified year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mortality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_rates_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_rates_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institutional affiliation of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES population_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to access the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sets" (
  "data_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data set */,
  "data_set_name" TEXT /* Name of the data set */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Description of the data set */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the data set was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sets_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data set the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_set_id") REFERENCES data_sets ("data_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "data_set_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data set */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "publication_url" TEXT /* URL to access the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_data_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_set_id") REFERENCES data_sets ("data_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "data_set_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data set */,
  "project_title" TEXT /* Title of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "project_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_data_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_set_id") REFERENCES data_sets ("data_set_id")
)
